- Index 0 in slice = col 6
- Index 1 in slice = col 7

- Index 5 in slice = col 11

- gg at cols 8-9
- NN at cols 10-11

So the green square is at cols 10-11, and the gray block is at cols 8-9. They're adjacent.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# I've used 55 of ~59 actions. Need to complete level quickly.
# Green square is at rows 30-31, cols 10-11
# Yellow container is at rows 20-23, cols 18-23 (YY at cols 20-21)
# Need to move green square up and right to reach yellow container

# Let me try moving up first, then right
# But first, let me check if there are obstacles

# Current state:
# - Green at rows 30-31, cols 10-11
# - Red block at rows 24-29, cols 14-17
# - Blue/charcoal pattern at rows 20-23, cols 14-17
# - Yellow container at rows 20-23, cols 18-23

# To reach yellow container, need to go up and right
# Path: up 10, right 8

# Let me try moving up first
print("Moving green square up and right...")
actions = ['UP'] * 8 + ['RIGHT'] * 8
result = action(actions)
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")

# Check green square position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green square now at: {n['boundary']}")
        break

# Check if level completed
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
